cards.title: Transparency
cards.text: We believe public work is a trust; we commit to full clarity in every step.

cards.title: Commitment
cards.text: We focus on tangible achievements, believing change is made through commitment and continuous effort.

cards.title: Professionalism
cards.text: We work methodically, putting student interests above all.

cards.title: Inclusiveness
cards.text: We are committed to representing all students, offering help, and making the association a safe, open space for everyone.

identity.title: Identity
identity.text:
The Engineering Association of the University of Khartoum is a student organization and the legitimate body representing all male and female students of the Faculty of Engineering across its departments and batches. It derives its legitimacy from student mandate through the electoral process.

The Association adopts the principle of 'comprehensive representation' in its identity, transcending sub-affiliations to solidify the unity of the Faculty of Engineering students. It also serves as the institutional bridge connecting student aspirations with the university administration. It works to provide academic support, social cohesion, and various activities to develop students' skills and awareness, while instilling the values of responsibility and teamwork, which are an integral part of the Faculty of Engineering's legacy.
